features.name: attribute on port connection in module instantiation
features.description: Code should include an attribute_instance attached as a suffix to a port connection in a module instantiation
features.snippet: modulename instance_name (q, d, (* clock_line *) ckl, rst);

features.name: attribute prefix on case statement
features.description: Code should include an attribute_instance as a prefix to a case statement

features.name: attribute suffix on binary operator
features.description: Code should include an attribute_instance as a suffix to a binary operator in an expression

features.name: attribute suffix on function call
features.description: Code should include an attribute_instance as a suffix to a function call in an expression
features.snippet: assign next_state = fsm_func(* meally_fsm *) (state, a, b, c);

features.name: attribute on conditional operator
features.description: Code should include an attribute_instance as a suffix to the conditional operator in an expression
